name: qinheng
tagline: Professional USB and Interface IC Solutions for Embedded Systems
description: QinHeng is a leading fabless semiconductor company specializing in USB interface chips, microcontrollers, and connectivity solutions. As an authorized distributor, we provide comprehensive product selection guidance, technical support, and competitive pricing for consumer electronics, industrial automation, and IoT applications.
longDescription:
QinHeng (南京沁恒微电子) is a premier fabless semiconductor company focused on developing USB interface chips, microcontrollers, and connectivity solutions for embedded systems. Founded in Nanjing, China, QinHeng has become a trusted supplier of USB bridge chips, USB microcontrollers, and interface converters that enable seamless connectivity in modern electronic devices.

The company's product portfolio spans USB-to-serial converters, USB hubs, USB PD controllers, wireless connectivity chips, and RISC-V microcontrollers. QinHeng products are known for their high integration, low power consumption, and excellent compatibility with various operating systems. The company holds multiple patents in USB communication technology and provides comprehensive software drivers and development tools.

QinHeng's solutions serve a wide range of markets including consumer electronics, industrial automation, medical devices, IoT applications, and automotive systems. The company's USB chips are widely used in printers, scanners, industrial control systems, and embedded devices requiring reliable USB connectivity.

With strong R&D capabilities and responsive technical support, QinHeng helps customers reduce development time and achieve cost-effective designs. As an authorized distributor, we provide genuine QinHeng products with full technical documentation, driver support, and application assistance.

seoTitle: QinHeng Distributor | USB Interface Chips & MCUs | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized QinHeng distributor offering USB interface chips, microcontrollers, wireless connectivity solutions, and serial converters for embedded applications.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of QinHeng products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of QinHeng (南京沁恒微电子) products. We maintain a direct partnership with QinHeng to provide customers with genuine USB interface chips, microcontrollers, and connectivity solutions. As an authorized distributor, we have access to QinHeng's full product portfolio and can provide comprehensive technical documentation, driver support, and application assistance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify our distributor status and request a formal quotation for your QinHeng product requirements.

faqs.question: What are QinHeng's core product categories?
faqs.answer: QinHeng specializes in four main product categories: USB Interface Chips including USB-to-serial converters (UART, SPI, I2C, parallel) and USB bridge chips; USB Microcontrollers featuring RISC-V cores with integrated USB peripherals; Wireless Connectivity solutions including Bluetooth Low Energy chips for IoT applications; and Interface Converters for various serial protocols. Each product line is designed for easy integration and comes with comprehensive driver support for Windows, Linux, and macOS.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to explore QinHeng's complete portfolio, or contact our FAE team for product recommendations based on your specific application requirements.

faqs.question: Does QinHeng provide software drivers for their USB chips?
faqs.answer: Yes, QinHeng provides comprehensive software driver support for all their USB interface chips. Drivers are available for Windows (XP/7/8/10/11), Linux (kernel 2.6 and above), macOS, and Android. The drivers support both virtual COM port (VCP) mode and direct DLL interface mode. QinHeng also provides application examples, API documentation, and debugging tools to accelerate development. All drivers are certified by Microsoft WHQL for Windows compatibility.
faqs.decisionGuide: Download drivers from our website or contact our FAE team for driver integration support and custom driver development.

faqs.question: What operating systems are supported by QinHeng USB chips?
faqs.answer: QinHeng USB interface chips support all major operating systems including Microsoft Windows (XP, Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11), Linux (kernel 2.6 and above with built-in drivers), macOS (10.6 and above), and Android (3.1 and above with USB host support). The chips use standard USB CDC class or provide custom drivers for enhanced functionality. Most chips support plug-and-play installation on modern operating systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: Check specific product datasheets for detailed OS compatibility. Contact our FAE team for OS-specific integration guidance.

faqs.question: Does QinHeng offer RISC-V microcontrollers?
faqs.answer: Yes, QinHeng offers a comprehensive lineup of RISC-V architecture microcontrollers under the CH32 series. These MCUs feature QingKe RISC-V cores with various performance levels, integrated USB peripherals, rich analog and digital interfaces, and competitive pricing. The CH32V307 series offers up to 144MHz operation with FPU, while the CH32X035 series provides cost-effective solutions for basic applications. All RISC-V MCUs are supported by open-source toolchains including GCC and PlatformIO.
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore our RISC-V microcontroller portfolio for your embedded applications. Contact our FAE team for migration support from ARM-based designs.

faqs.question: How can I get technical support for QinHeng products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for QinHeng products including product selection guidance, driver installation assistance, firmware development support, and troubleshooting. Our FAE team has expertise in USB communication protocols and embedded systems design. We provide access to QinHeng's technical documentation, application notes, and reference designs. For complex designs, we offer on-site support and can connect you with QinHeng's engineering team in China.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team with your technical questions or schedule a design review session for your QinHeng-based design.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for QinHeng products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for QinHeng products vary based on product type and order quantity. Standard USB interface chips typically have 4-8 week lead times. Popular microcontroller models are often available from stock. For high-volume orders, LiTong can work with QinHeng to secure allocation and optimize delivery schedules. We maintain inventory of fast-moving products for immediate delivery on standard orders.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for current lead times and inventory availability. For production orders, we recommend placing orders in advance to ensure timely delivery.

faqs.question: Can LiTong provide samples of QinHeng products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong provides engineering samples of QinHeng products for evaluation and prototyping purposes. Sample requests are typically processed within 3-5 business days. We can provide samples for most products in our catalog, along with evaluation boards, driver software, and application notes to support your evaluation. For high-volume or specialized sample requests, please provide details about your application and expected production volumes.
faqs.decisionGuide: Submit your sample request through our website or contact our sales team with the specific part numbers and quantities you need for evaluation.
